name: example-project
description: Non-secret template for adapting the portable Pi harness to one project.

rules: Use exact direct tool names only.
Classify each tool as read-only or write-like before selecting it.
Record external-write intent and proof for write-like actions.

stopConditions: Stop if private material is required.
Stop if production-affecting action is required without approval.
Stop if a connector tool has unknown read/write behavior.
